textByHash.01ba342c865b4b87a41d57cf004e9fb87e9c3a81: Ok, to start with there are spiders! These are pretty tough but if you defeat it, you can get a good meal from it, if you know how to cook it that is. My wife cooks them to a turn - Mmmm, delicious.
textByHash.11e2876e9377ff11371b847dbb06d46c68585c41: Waahhhhh! - It's da evil broodoo beast come ta eat my very soul!
textByHash.1245a27f66f163896c938c0214f704a5d04224d1: Hello there...thanks for helping out Trufitus commune with the gods Bwana. We've been able to return to the village thanks to your help.
textByHash.173e70b3902d21891fe9891a993b6ea846c050d9: Bwana, if anyone else asks me that question today, I'll explode! Go and ask someone else!
textByHash.33f92233a6d7ddb6ff0b03d9edb1c6a96dfbbee0: Sorry Bwana, I'm already busy, why not go and talk to Murcaily! He's around the village somewhere.
textByHash.417826b2d53ec40467b0cca8bfabd4b7e135da2f: If they're disturbed they will attack anything in the area with their magical abilities! They suffer little from being attacked as they seem to be protected by some form of defence.
textByHash.55392b93181b9493d60c158dd5a058d59dd021c7: Then there are giant mosquitoes bwana, they're fast and agile. You'll need to be quick if you're to hit them at all! However, it certainly does train your reactions. They're not very tough, just difficult to hit.
textByHash.5a325a16fb45cd32a622307ce68e177cd3e3b0e6: Ahhhhhhhh - Get away from me you beast!
textByHash.5d1dfa7da0b1baf7744be3e8cd855b9c199c464e: These strange creatures have the curse of the Broodoo on them! They'll rise from their grave with their heads in their chests and move like crazy spirits of the afterlife.
textByHash.5d96f9a2465c5cc64bea4eda05d7de0b7aa55e0d: Well, I think that there's some work to be done...perhaps Murcaily can help you. He usually tends to the hardwood grove to the east of Trufitus's hut.
textByHash.618d3a577b96dcc3fa765f6b6a246eeffb4a0cbe: Ok Bwana, I will! To begin with you'll need a machete in order to hack your way through the jungle. There are some better gem edged weapons which you may be able to purchase from Gabooty.
textByHash.709db4cb5b9c384349897d4c47e638cc95563f28: However... it is said that the means of their death provides the clue to their destruction. So far three distinct Broodoo have been identified. The Broodoo with a green hued skin is said to have died from poison.
textByHash.7b65445719990c67d746b227a4adbd4c080d4165: There is a broodoo of yellow hue and a pale skinned broodoo, but little is known of these two!
textByHash.91a3d2f5151113a19a0e2ad6baff978959ee3c32: Yeah, you've been doing a lot of good work around here. Let me give you something for your time and effort.
textByHash.9ae5f95f44f30cfd96c314000ac2a30ce1753416: You may need several skins in order to make something useful.
textByHash.a13c97b16dd808636ea781fda986c3720c455144: I's not doing a great deal now Bwana, as I'm no spring chicken. I do my fair share around the village bwana, though, I could tell you a thing or two about the jungle slashing.
textByHash.a7b264af8f90d948aa84245c7cfa3a30d3133188: And also, you may find an uncommon rock type which is impregnated with mineral wealth! Well that concludes all the help I can give you regarding the jungle in Tai Bwo Wannai!
textByHash.acdfb2cf4283cbd03a1085413c4a79e15a12c40c: They sometimes hide in the jungle bushes waiting for an opportunity to strike when we least expect it! Take care Bwana, these treacherous jungle natives use poison on their spears!
textByHash.b600c2e50b6b75e42e08299b262f8ea15905b37f: Some of the local villagers have found strange plants which grow here-abouts. If you cut away at the jungle and find one, it's considered a blessing, though the useful part of the plant is usually buried underground.
textByHash.b83d3464c69329161796f8656b2d211eb243f377: I've already given you some trading sticks and I don't have any more on me at the moment. Why not go and talk to some of the other villagers and get some contributions?
textByHash.c1303ad6dba14eea2fcb6673b1830403dd84ff01: Once the hide is tanned you get a snakeskin and you're able to make things from it, the same way that mainlanders use normal leather! However, it's actually still quite small.
textByHash.cb6693a7bec01cd541ec22da9e043018a7886a58: Safta Doc makes them for him. You should be aware that hacking away at the jungle is not without its dangers though Bwana. Many times you may find some scary creatures lurking inside.
textByHash.cd3f2be765fa87fd977c8cc489ce28654e523172: I also believe that their proboscis is useful in someway, I believe Timfraku's sons sometimes use them for hunting.
textByHash.dfc5f8174638da087b660127a73d91ae5a58dd41: Not that I'm aware of, just sit back and enjoy the sunshine bwana!
textByHash.e35d23b93476d3d00c9aec14a5a1cbb38112ee70: Yes Bwana... and this is serious... The jungle is very ancient and many unspeakable acts have been witnessed on these lands. Bizarre supernatural curses were placed on criminals and then they were buried alive!
textByHash.e72a1f6c928e838d992ec85e0180fb7f7144e537: It's just village life as normal around here Bwana, always something interesting to find to occupy your time if you look hard enough.
textByHash.f270e596827f414bfc40c2fb9cc3e3844e95afc0: Yes Bwana, much much more! What next...Oh yes, the tribesmen...you've probably seen them scouting around the village, sometimes sneaking inside the enclosure to steal our chickens!
textByHash.f3af5465e52db48f4589bfeab0c6fa27ed62ca24: Yes Bwana, of course. Then there are snakes...these are dangerous because they're poisonous - so be prepared! However, they're not without their uses. A bush snake is large enough to have a useful hide.
